sentences.text: Într-o dimineață, o tânără a venit la noi.
sentences.translationRu: Однажды утром к нам пришла молодая женщина.
sentences.original: One morning a young woman came to see us.

sentences.text: Ne-a spus că se numește Violet Marsh.
sentences.translationRu: Она сказала, что её зовут Вайолет Марш.
sentences.original: She told us her name was Violet Marsh.

sentences.text: Părea inteligentă și hotărâtă.
sentences.translationRu: Она казалась умной и решительной.
sentences.original: She seemed intelligent and determined.

sentences.text: A spus că vrea sfatul lui Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Она сказала, что хочет совета Пуаро.
sentences.original: She said she wanted Poirot's advice.

sentences.text: — Problema mea este neobișnuită, a început ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Моя проблема необычная, начала она.
sentences.original: My problem is unusual, she began.

sentences.text: — Nu știu dacă mă puteți ajuta.
sentences.translationRu: — Не знаю, можете ли вы мне помочь.
sentences.original: I do not know if you can help me.

sentences.text: — Dar nu am pe nimeni altcineva.
sentences.translationRu: — Но у меня больше никого нет.
sentences.original: But I have no one else.

sentences.text: Poirot i-a oferit un scaun.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро предложил ей стул.
sentences.original: Poirot offered her a chair.

sentences.text: — Vă rog, povestiți-mi totul de la început, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Прошу, расскажите мне всё с самого начала, сказал он.
sentences.original: Please tell me everything from the beginning, he said.

sentences.text: — Detaliile mici sunt adesea foarte importante.
sentences.translationRu: — Мелкие детали часто очень важны.
sentences.original: Small details are often very important.

sentences.text: — Părinții mei au murit când eram copil, a spus Violet.
sentences.translationRu: — Мои родители умерли, когда я была ребёнком, сказала Вайолет.
sentences.original: My parents died when I was a child, said Violet.

sentences.text: — Aveam doar paisprezece ani.
sentences.translationRu: — Мне было всего четырнадцать лет.
sentences.original: I was only fourteen years old.

sentences.text: — Unchiul meu, Andrew Marsh, m-a luat la el.
sentences.translationRu: — Мой дядя, Эндрю Марш, взял меня к себе.
sentences.original: My uncle, Andrew Marsh, took me in.

sentences.text: — Avea o fermă mare în Devon.
sentences.translationRu: — У него была большая ферма в Девоне.
sentences.original: He had a large farm in Devon.

sentences.text: — Unchiul era un om bun, dar foarte ciudat.
sentences.translationRu: — Дядя был добрым, но очень странным человеком.
sentences.original: My uncle was a kind man, but very strange.

sentences.text: — Avea idei vechi despre lume.
sentences.translationRu: — У него были старомодные взгляды на мир.
sentences.original: He had old-fashioned ideas about the world.

sentences.text: — Spunea mereu că femeile nu sunt inteligente.
sentences.translationRu: — Он всегда говорил, что женщины не умны.
sentences.original: He always said that women are not intelligent.

sentences.text: — Eu nu eram de acord cu el, a continuat ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Я была с ним не согласна, продолжила она.
sentences.original: I did not agree with him, she went on.

sentences.text: — Voiam să studiez și să învăț.
sentences.translationRu: — Я хотела учиться и получать знания.
sentences.original: I wanted to study and to learn.

sentences.text: — Așa că ne certam des despre asta.
sentences.translationRu: — Поэтому мы часто из-за этого спорили.
sentences.original: So we argued about it often.

sentences.text: — Am plecat la universitate fără banii lui.
sentences.translationRu: — Я уехала в университет без его денег.
sentences.original: I went to the university without his money.

sentences.text: — Am muncit din greu și am luat note bune.
sentences.translationRu: — Я упорно работала и получала хорошие оценки.
sentences.original: I worked hard and got good marks.

sentences.text: — Voiam să-i arăt că greșea.
sentences.translationRu: — Я хотела показать ему, что он ошибается.
sentences.original: I wanted to show him he was wrong.

sentences.text: — Acum câteva săptămâni, unchiul a murit, a spus ea încet.
sentences.translationRu: — Несколько недель назад дядя умер, сказала она тихо.
sentences.original: A few weeks ago my uncle died, she said quietly.

sentences.text: — Și a lăsat un testament foarte ciudat.
sentences.translationRu: — И оставил очень странное завещание.
sentences.original: And he left a very strange will.

sentences.text: — Vă explic ce scrie în el, a spus Violet.
sentences.translationRu: — Я объясню, что в нём написано, сказала Вайолет.
sentences.original: I will explain what it says, said Violet.

sentences.text: — Pot să locuiesc în casa lui timp de un an.
sentences.translationRu: — Я могу жить в его доме в течение года.
sentences.original: I may live in his house for one year.

sentences.text: — În acest an trebuie să-mi dovedesc inteligența.
sentences.translationRu: — За этот год я должна доказать свой ум.
sentences.original: In that year I must prove my wits.

sentences.text: — Dacă reușesc, casa și toți banii devin ai mei.
sentences.translationRu: — Если справлюсь, дом и все деньги станут моими.
sentences.original: If I succeed, the house and all the money become mine.

sentences.text: — Dacă nu reușesc, totul merge la opere de caritate.
sentences.translationRu: — Если нет, всё уйдёт на благотворительность.
sentences.original: If I fail, everything goes to charity.

sentences.text: — Adică spitale și case pentru săraci.
sentences.translationRu: — То есть в больницы и приюты для бедных.
sentences.original: That is, hospitals and homes for the poor.

sentences.text: — Dar iată ceea ce nu înțeleg, a spus ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Но вот чего я не понимаю, сказала она.
sentences.original: But here is what I do not understand, she said.

sentences.text: — Testamentul nu spune ce trebuie să fac.
sentences.translationRu: — Завещание не говорит, что я должна делать.
sentences.original: The will does not say what I must do.

sentences.text: — Cum pot să-mi dovedesc inteligența?
sentences.translationRu: — Как я могу доказать свой ум?
sentences.original: How can I prove my wits?

sentences.text: — Cred că unchiul a ascuns ceva în casă, a spus Violet.
sentences.translationRu: — Думаю, дядя что-то спрятал в доме, сказала Вайолет.
sentences.original: I think my uncle hid something in the house, said Violet.

sentences.text: — Poate există un alt testament secret.
sentences.translationRu: — Может быть, существует другое тайное завещание.
sentences.original: Maybe there is another secret will.

sentences.text: — Dar nu pot să-l găsesc singură.
sentences.translationRu: — Но я не могу найти его сама.
sentences.original: But I cannot find it alone.

sentences.text: Poirot a ascultat-o cu mare interes.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро выслушал её с большим интересом.
sentences.original: Poirot listened to her with great interest.

sentences.text: — Este o problemă foarte interesantă, a spus el în sfârșit.
sentences.translationRu: — Это очень интересная задача, сказал он наконец.
sentences.original: It is a very interesting problem, he said at last.

sentences.text: — Unchiul tău a fost un om deștept.
sentences.translationRu: — Твой дядя был умным человеком.
sentences.original: Your uncle was a clever man.

sentences.text: — Voi accepta acest caz cu plăcere.
sentences.translationRu: — Я возьмусь за это дело с удовольствием.
sentences.original: I will take this case with pleasure.

sentences.text: A doua zi, am plecat cu trenul spre Devon.
sentences.translationRu: На следующий день мы поехали на поезде в Девон.
sentences.original: The next day we took the train to Devon.

sentences.text: Ferma era departe, la țară.
sentences.translationRu: Ферма была далеко, в деревне.
sentences.original: The farm was far away, in the country.

sentences.text: Casa era veche, mare și liniștită.
sentences.translationRu: Дом был старый, большой и тихий.
sentences.original: The house was old, big and quiet.

sentences.text: Era înconjurată de câmpuri verzi.
sentences.translationRu: Его окружали зелёные поля.
sentences.original: It was surrounded by green fields.

sentences.text: Doi servitori bătrâni aveau grijă de casă.
sentences.translationRu: За домом присматривали двое старых слуг.
sentences.original: Two old servants looked after the house.

sentences.text: Erau domnul și doamna Baker.
sentences.translationRu: Это были господин и госпожа Бейкер.
sentences.original: They were Mr. and Mrs. Baker.

sentences.text: Lucraseră pentru bătrânul Marsh mulți ani.
sentences.translationRu: Они много лет работали на старого Марша.
sentences.original: They had worked for old Marsh for many years.

sentences.text: Ne-au primit foarte bine.
sentences.translationRu: Они приняли нас очень радушно.
sentences.original: They received us very kindly.

sentences.text: Poirot a vrut să vorbească cu domnul Baker.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро захотел поговорить с господином Бейкером.
sentences.original: Poirot wanted to speak with Mr. Baker.

sentences.text: — Povestiți-mi despre ziua testamentului, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Расскажите мне о дне с завещанием, сказал он.
sentences.original: Tell me about the day of the will, he said.

sentences.text: — Vreau să știu fiecare detaliu.
sentences.translationRu: — Я хочу знать каждую деталь.
sentences.original: I want to know every detail.

sentences.text: — Ah, da, îmi amintesc bine, domnule, a spus Baker.
sentences.translationRu: — Ах да, я хорошо помню, сударь, сказал Бейкер.
sentences.original: Ah yes, I remember it well, sir, said Baker.

sentences.text: — Într-o dimineață, stăpânul m-a trimis în orașul vecin.
sentences.translationRu: — Однажды утром хозяин послал меня в соседний город.
sentences.original: One morning the master sent me to the nearby town.

sentences.text: — Mi-a cerut să cumpăr două formulare de testament.
sentences.translationRu: — Он попросил купить два бланка для завещания.
sentences.original: He asked me to buy two printed will-forms.

sentences.text: — Am adus hârtiile acasă, a continuat el.
sentences.translationRu: — Я принёс бумаги домой, продолжил он.
sentences.original: I brought the forms home, he went on.

sentences.text: — Stăpânul a scris ceva pe prima hârtie.
sentences.translationRu: — Хозяин что-то написал на первой бумаге.
sentences.original: The master wrote something on the first form.

sentences.text: — Apoi eu și soția mea am semnat ca martori.
sentences.translationRu: — Потом я и жена подписались как свидетели.
sentences.original: Then my wife and I signed as witnesses.

sentences.text: — Dar apoi s-a întâmplat ceva ciudat, a spus Baker.
sentences.translationRu: — Но потом случилось странное, сказал Бейкер.
sentences.original: But then something strange happened, said Baker.

sentences.text: — Stăpânul s-a uitat la hârtie și s-a încruntat.
sentences.translationRu: — Хозяин посмотрел на бумагу и нахмурился.
sentences.original: The master looked at the form and frowned.

sentences.text: — A spus: Am făcut o greșeală.
sentences.translationRu: — Он сказал: Я допустил ошибку.
sentences.original: He said: I have made a mistake.

sentences.text: — A rupt prima hârtie în bucăți.
sentences.translationRu: — Он разорвал первую бумагу на куски.
sentences.original: He tore the first form to pieces.

sentences.text: — Apoi a luat a doua hârtie, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Потом он взял вторую бумагу, сказал он.
sentences.original: Then he took the second form, he said.

sentences.text: — A scris din nou și ne-a cerut să semnăm.
sentences.translationRu: — Снова написал и попросил нас подписать.
sentences.original: He wrote again and asked us to sign.

sentences.text: — Așa că am semnat încă o dată.
sentences.translationRu: — Так что мы подписались ещё раз.
sentences.original: So we signed once more.

sentences.text: — Și ce a făcut după aceea? a întrebat Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — А что он сделал потом? спросил Пуаро.
sentences.original: And what did he do after that? asked Poirot.

sentences.text: — A plecat imediat în oraș, domnule.
sentences.translationRu: — Он тут же ушёл в город, сударь.
sentences.original: He went to town at once, sir.

sentences.text: — A spus că trebuie să plătească negustorii din sat.
sentences.translationRu: — Сказал, что должен заплатить торговцам в деревне.
sentences.original: He said he had to pay the tradesmen in the village.

sentences.text: — A lipsit toată după-amiaza.
sentences.translationRu: — Его не было весь день.
sentences.original: He was gone all afternoon.

sentences.text: Poirot a tăcut câteva clipe.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро на несколько мгновений замолчал.
sentences.original: Poirot was silent for a few moments.

sentences.text: Vedeam că gândea intens.
sentences.translationRu: Я видел, что он напряжённо думает.
sentences.original: I could see he was thinking hard.

sentences.text: — Mulțumesc, domnule Baker, a spus el în cele din urmă.
sentences.translationRu: — Спасибо, господин Бейкер, сказал он наконец.
sentences.original: Thank you, Mr. Baker, he said at last.

sentences.text: — Mi-ați spus exact ce aveam nevoie.
sentences.translationRu: — Вы сказали мне ровно то, что было нужно.
sentences.original: You have told me exactly what I needed.

sentences.text: Apoi Poirot a început să caute prin casă.
sentences.translationRu: Затем Пуаро начал искать по дому.
sentences.original: Then Poirot began to search the house.

sentences.text: A intrat în fiecare cameră, una după alta.
sentences.translationRu: Он заходил в каждую комнату, одну за другой.
sentences.original: He went into every room, one after another.

sentences.text: Eu îl urmăream cu nerăbdare.
sentences.translationRu: Я следовал за ним с нетерпением.
sentences.original: I followed him impatiently.

sentences.text: — Ce căutăm exact, Poirot? am întrebat.
sentences.translationRu: — Что именно мы ищем, Пуаро? спросил я.
sentences.original: What exactly are we looking for, Poirot? I asked.

sentences.text: — Ceva care nu este la locul lui, prietene, a răspuns el.
sentences.translationRu: — Что-то, что не на своём месте, друг мой, ответил он.
sentences.original: Something out of place, my friend, he replied.

sentences.text: — Un detaliu mic și ciudat.
sentences.translationRu: — Маленькую странную деталь.
sentences.original: A small, strange detail.

sentences.text: — Bătrânul a lăsat un indiciu undeva.
sentences.translationRu: — Старик где-то оставил подсказку.
sentences.original: The old man left a clue somewhere.

sentences.text: În cele din urmă am ajuns în birou.
sentences.translationRu: Наконец мы пришли в кабинет.
sentences.original: At last we came to the study.

sentences.text: Era camera unde lucra bătrânul Marsh.
sentences.translationRu: Это была комната, где работал старый Марш.
sentences.original: It was the room where old Marsh used to work.

sentences.text: În mijloc era un birou vechi și solid.
sentences.translationRu: Посреди стоял старый прочный письменный стол.
sentences.original: In the middle was an old, solid desk.

sentences.text: Avea un capac special care se rula în sus.
sentences.translationRu: У него была особая крышка, сворачивавшаяся вверх.
sentences.original: It had a special roll top that pulled up.

sentences.text: Pe perete atârnau multe chei.
sentences.translationRu: На стене висело много ключей.
sentences.original: On the wall hung many keys.

sentences.text: Poirot le-a examinat pe toate cu atenție.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро внимательно осмотрел их все.
sentences.original: Poirot examined them all carefully.

sentences.text: Fiecare cheie avea o etichetă curată.
sentences.translationRu: У каждого ключа была чистая бирка.
sentences.original: Each key had a clean label.

sentences.text: Scrisul de pe etichete era ordonat și frumos.
sentences.translationRu: Надписи на бирках были аккуратными и красивыми.
sentences.original: The writing on the labels was neat and tidy.

sentences.text: Dar o cheie era complet diferită.
sentences.translationRu: Но один ключ был совсем другим.
sentences.original: But one key was completely different.

sentences.text: Era cheia biroului cu capac rulant.
sentences.translationRu: Это был ключ от стола со сворачивающейся крышкой.
sentences.original: It was the key of the roll top desk.

sentences.text: Aceasta nu avea o etichetă curată ca celelalte.
sentences.translationRu: У него не было чистой бирки, как у других.
sentences.original: It did not have a clean label like the others.

sentences.text: De cheie era prins un plic murdar și vechi.
sentences.translationRu: К ключу был привязан грязный старый конверт.
sentences.original: A dirty old envelope was tied to the key.

sentences.text: Pe plic scria: Cheia biroului cu capac rulant.
sentences.translationRu: На конверте было написано: Ключ от стола со сворачивающейся крышкой.
sentences.original: On the envelope it said: Key of Roll Top Desk.

sentences.text: Dar scrisul era urât și neîngrijit.
sentences.translationRu: Но почерк был некрасивый и небрежный.
sentences.original: But the writing was ugly and untidy.

sentences.text: Nu semăna deloc cu scrisul de pe celelalte etichete.
sentences.translationRu: Он совсем не походил на почерк на других бирках.
sentences.original: It was quite unlike the writing on the other labels.

sentences.text: Deodată Poirot s-a oprit.
sentences.translationRu: Вдруг Пуаро остановился.
sentences.original: Suddenly Poirot stopped.

sentences.text: Ochii lui verzi au strălucit.
sentences.translationRu: Его зелёные глаза заблестели.
sentences.original: His green eyes shone.

sentences.text: — Ah! a exclamat el. Iată indiciul!
sentences.translationRu: — А! воскликнул он. Вот подсказка!
sentences.original: Ah! he exclaimed. Here is the clue!

sentences.text: — Privește, prietene, mi-a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Смотри, друг мой, сказал он мне.
sentences.original: Look, my friend, he said to me.

sentences.text: — Toate cheile au etichete curate și ordonate.
sentences.translationRu: — У всех ключей чистые и аккуратные бирки.
sentences.original: All the keys have clean, neat labels.

sentences.text: — Numai aceasta are un plic murdar și ciudat.
sentences.translationRu: — Только у этого грязный и странный конверт.
sentences.original: Only this one has a dirty, strange envelope.

sentences.text: — De ce? Pentru că plicul este important!
sentences.translationRu: — Почему? Потому что конверт важен!
sentences.original: Why? Because the envelope is important!

sentences.text: Poirot a luat plicul cu mare grijă.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро очень осторожно взял конверт.
sentences.original: Poirot took the envelope with great care.

sentences.text: L-a deschis încet, cu degetele.
sentences.translationRu: Он медленно открыл его пальцами.
sentences.original: He opened it slowly with his fingers.

sentences.text: A privit înăuntru, dar părea gol.
sentences.translationRu: Он заглянул внутрь, но он казался пустым.
sentences.original: He looked inside, but it seemed empty.

sentences.text: — Nu este nimic acolo, am spus dezamăgit.
sentences.translationRu: — Там ничего нет, сказал я разочарованно.
sentences.original: There is nothing there, I said, disappointed.

sentences.text: — Răbdare, Hastings, a spus Poirot zâmbind.
sentences.translationRu: — Терпение, Гастингс, сказал Пуаро, улыбаясь.
sentences.original: Patience, Hastings, said Poirot, smiling.

sentences.text: — Eu cred că aici este o cerneală specială.
sentences.translationRu: — Я думаю, здесь особые чернила.
sentences.original: I think there is a special ink here.

sentences.text: — O cerneală care nu se vede.
sentences.translationRu: — Чернила, которые не видны.
sentences.original: An ink that cannot be seen.

sentences.text: Poirot a aprins focul în șemineu.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро разжёг огонь в камине.
sentences.original: Poirot lit the fire in the fireplace.

sentences.text: Apoi a ținut plicul aproape de flacără.
sentences.translationRu: Затем он поднёс конверт близко к пламени.
sentences.original: Then he held the envelope close to the flame.

sentences.text: A ținut partea de dinăuntru spre căldură.
sentences.translationRu: Он держал внутреннюю сторону к теплу.
sentences.original: He held the inside surface to the heat.

sentences.text: Am așteptat câteva minute lungi.
sentences.translationRu: Мы прождали несколько долгих минут.
sentences.original: We waited a few long minutes.

sentences.text: Și deodată am văzut ceva uimitor!
sentences.translationRu: И вдруг мы увидели нечто поразительное!
sentences.original: And suddenly we saw something amazing!

sentences.text: Litere palide au început să apară pe hârtie.
sentences.translationRu: На бумаге начали проступать бледные буквы.
sentences.original: Faint letters began to appear on the paper.

sentences.text: Cerneala secretă devenea vizibilă din cauza căldurii.
sentences.translationRu: Тайные чернила становились видимыми от тепла.
sentences.original: The secret ink became visible because of the heat.

sentences.text: Încet, încet, am putut să citim cuvintele.
sentences.translationRu: Медленно-медленно мы смогли прочесть слова.
sentences.original: Slowly, slowly, we could read the words.

sentences.text: Pe partea de dinăuntru a plicului era un testament!
sentences.translationRu: На внутренней стороне конверта было завещание!
sentences.original: On the inside of the envelope there was a will!

sentences.text: Bătrânul Marsh îl scrisese cu cerneală invizibilă.
sentences.translationRu: Старый Марш написал его невидимыми чернилами.
sentences.original: Old Marsh had written it with invisible ink.

sentences.text: Era adevăratul lui testament, ascuns cu grijă.
sentences.translationRu: Это было его настоящее завещание, тщательно спрятанное.
sentences.original: It was his real will, carefully hidden.

sentences.text: Mesajul era clar și simplu.
sentences.translationRu: Сообщение было ясным и простым.
sentences.original: The message was clear and simple.

sentences.text: Bătrânul lăsa totul nepoatei sale.
sentences.translationRu: Старик оставлял всё своей племяннице.
sentences.original: The old man left everything to his niece.

sentences.text: Casa, ferma și toți banii erau pentru Violet Marsh.
sentences.translationRu: Дом, ферма и все деньги были для Вайолет Марш.
sentences.original: The house, the farm and all the money were for Violet Marsh.

sentences.text: Sub testament erau două semnături de martori.
sentences.translationRu: Под завещанием стояли две подписи свидетелей.
sentences.original: Below the will were two witnesses' signatures.

sentences.text: Erau Albert Pike și Jessie Pike.
sentences.translationRu: Это были Альберт Пайк и Джесси Пайк.
sentences.original: They were Albert Pike and Jessie Pike.

sentences.text: Albert Pike era cofetar în orașul vecin.
sentences.translationRu: Альберт Пайк был кондитером в соседнем городе.
sentences.original: Albert Pike was a confectioner in the nearby town.

sentences.text: Testamentul avea și data și ora exactă.
sentences.translationRu: На завещании была точная дата и время.
sentences.original: The will also had the exact date and time.

sentences.text: — Acum totul este limpede, a spus Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Теперь всё ясно, сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: Now everything is clear, said Poirot.

sentences.text: — Bătrânul Marsh a fost extraordinar de deștept.
sentences.translationRu: — Старый Марш был необычайно умён.
sentences.original: Old Marsh was extraordinarily clever.

sentences.text: — A pregătit totul cu mare grijă.
sentences.translationRu: — Он всё подготовил с большой тщательностью.
sentences.original: He prepared everything with great care.

sentences.text: — Cele două formulare de testament au fost doar un truc, a explicat el.
sentences.translationRu: — Два бланка завещания были просто уловкой, объяснил он.
sentences.original: The two will-forms were only a trick, he explained.

sentences.text: — Bakerii au semnat hârtii care nu însemnau nimic.
sentences.translationRu: — Бейкеры подписали бумаги, которые ничего не значили.
sentences.original: The Bakers signed forms that meant nothing.

sentences.text: — Bătrânul le-a rupt sau le-a aruncat mai târziu.
sentences.translationRu: — Старик их потом порвал или выбросил.
sentences.original: The old man tore them up or threw them away later.

sentences.text: — Adevăratul testament era pe acest plic, a continuat Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Настоящее завещание было на этом конверте, продолжил Пуаро.
sentences.original: The real will was on this envelope, Poirot went on.

sentences.text: — L-a scris cu cerneală invizibilă.
sentences.translationRu: — Он написал его невидимыми чернилами.
sentences.original: He wrote it with invisible ink.

sentences.text: — Apoi a prins plicul de cheia biroului.
sentences.translationRu: — Затем привязал конверт к ключу от стола.
sentences.original: Then he tied the envelope to the desk key.

sentences.text: — A făcut plicul murdar special, ca să atragă atenția.
sentences.translationRu: — Он специально сделал конверт грязным, чтобы привлечь внимание.
sentences.original: He made the envelope dirty on purpose, to draw attention.

sentences.text: — Iar când a plecat în oraș în acea zi, a spus el...
sentences.translationRu: — А когда он в тот день ушёл в город, сказал он...
sentences.original: And when he went to town that day, he said...

sentences.text: — ...nu s-a dus să plătească negustorii.
sentences.translationRu: — ...он пошёл не торговцам платить.
sentences.original: ...he did not go to pay the tradesmen.

sentences.text: — S-a dus la cofetar și la soția lui.
sentences.translationRu: — Он пошёл к кондитеру и его жене.
sentences.original: He went to the confectioner and his wife.

sentences.text: — Le-a cerut să semneze adevăratul testament.
sentences.translationRu: — Он попросил их подписать настоящее завещание.
sentences.original: He asked them to sign the real will.

sentences.text: — Astfel, nimeni din casă nu știa secretul, a spus Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Так никто в доме не знал тайны, сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: Thus no one in the house knew the secret, said Poirot.

sentences.text: — Bătrânul a ascuns testamentul perfect.
sentences.translationRu: — Старик спрятал завещание идеально.
sentences.original: The old man hid the will perfectly.

sentences.text: — Numai o minte ageră putea să-l găsească.
sentences.translationRu: — Только острый ум мог его найти.
sentences.original: Only a sharp mind could find it.

sentences.text: Apoi am mers să o vedem pe Violet Marsh.
sentences.translationRu: Затем мы пошли к Вайолет Марш.
sentences.original: Then we went to see Violet Marsh.

sentences.text: Poirot i-a dat vestea cea bună.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро сообщил ей радостную весть.
sentences.original: Poirot gave her the good news.

sentences.text: — Am găsit adevăratul testament, domnișoară, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Я нашёл настоящее завещание, мадемуазель, сказал он.
sentences.original: I have found the real will, mademoiselle, he said.

sentences.text: — Casa, ferma și banii vă aparțin acum.
sentences.translationRu: — Дом, ферма и деньги теперь принадлежат вам.
sentences.original: The house, the farm and the money now belong to you.

sentences.text: Violet era foarte fericită și emoționată.
sentences.translationRu: Вайолет была очень счастлива и взволнована.
sentences.original: Violet was very happy and moved.

sentences.text: — Nu știu cum să vă mulțumesc, domnule Poirot! a spus ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Не знаю, как вас благодарить, господин Пуаро! сказала она.
sentences.original: I do not know how to thank you, Mr. Poirot! she said.

sentences.text: Dar Poirot a ridicat un deget și a zâmbit.
sentences.translationRu: Но Пуаро поднял палец и улыбнулся.
sentences.original: But Poirot raised a finger and smiled.

sentences.text: — Așteptați puțin, domnișoară, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Подождите немного, мадемуазель, сказал он.
sentences.original: Wait a moment, mademoiselle, he said.

sentences.text: — Aici este o mică problemă morală.
sentences.translationRu: — Тут есть маленькая нравственная загвоздка.
sentences.original: Here there is a small moral problem.

sentences.text: — Unchiul tău a vrut ca tu să găsești testamentul, a explicat el.
sentences.translationRu: — Твой дядя хотел, чтобы завещание нашла ты, объяснил он.
sentences.original: Your uncle wanted you to find the will, he explained.

sentences.text: — Voia ca tu să-ți dovedești inteligența.
sentences.translationRu: — Он хотел, чтобы ты доказала свой ум.
sentences.original: He wanted you to prove your wits.

sentences.text: — Dar nu tu l-ai găsit, ci eu.
sentences.translationRu: — Но нашла его не ты, а я.
sentences.original: But you did not find it, I did.

sentences.text: — Deci, după voința unchiului, ai pierdut proba, a spus Poirot blând.
sentences.translationRu: — Значит, по воле дяди, испытание ты не прошла, мягко сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: So, by your uncle's wish, you failed the test, said Poirot gently.

sentences.text: — Banii ar trebui să meargă la opere de caritate.
sentences.translationRu: — Деньги должны уйти на благотворительность.
sentences.original: The money should go to charity.

sentences.text: — Ce vei face acum?
sentences.translationRu: — Что ты теперь сделаешь?
sentences.original: What will you do now?

sentences.text: Violet a tăcut o clipă, apoi a zâmbit cald.
sentences.translationRu: Вайолет помолчала мгновение, потом тепло улыбнулась.
sentences.original: Violet was silent for a moment, then she smiled warmly.

sentences.text: — Aveți dreptate, domnule Poirot, a spus ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Вы правы, господин Пуаро, сказала она.
sentences.original: You are right, Mr. Poirot, she said.

sentences.text: — Nu vreau banii în acest fel.
sentences.translationRu: — Я не хочу эти деньги таким образом.
sentences.original: I do not want the money this way.

sentences.text: — Îi voi dărui spitalelor și oamenilor săraci.
sentences.translationRu: — Я отдам их больницам и бедным людям.
sentences.original: I will give it to the hospitals and the poor people.

sentences.text: Poirot a privit-o cu admirație.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро посмотрел на неё с восхищением.
sentences.original: Poirot looked at her with admiration.

sentences.text: — Sunteți o femeie cu adevărat inteligentă, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: — Вы поистине умная женщина, сказал он.
sentences.original: You are a truly intelligent woman, he said.

sentences.text: — Cred că unchiul tău ar fi mândru de tine.
sentences.translationRu: — Думаю, ваш дядя гордился бы вами.
sentences.original: I think your uncle would be proud of you.

sentences.text: Așa s-a încheiat cazul testamentului dispărut.
sentences.translationRu: Так завершилось дело о пропавшем завещании.
sentences.original: So ended the case of the missing will.

sentences.text: Poirot rezolvase încă o enigmă dificilă.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро разгадал ещё одну трудную загадку.
sentences.original: Poirot had solved another difficult puzzle.

sentences.text: Și bătrânul Marsh, în felul lui ciudat, avusese dreptate.
sentences.translationRu: И старый Марш, на свой странный лад, оказался прав.
sentences.original: And old Marsh, in his strange way, had been right.
